synopsis: The SJC found that Presbytery of Siouxlands erred in denying a complaint that sought the appointment of a committee to conduct a BCO 31-2 investigation into whether TE Greg Lawrence held or taught views associated with Federal Vision theology contrary to the PCA's doctrinal standards. The Court directed that the presbytery conduct the required investigation and established that credible reports affecting Christian character warrant investigation regardless of the evidentiary standards required for conviction.
